themes: The backlog is dominated by Managers across multi-location franchise, hospitality, residential, and fitness brands who are waiting far too long for product conversations, signaling a systemic gap in how SOCi proactively engages power users who drive daily platform adoption.

Several accounts appear multiple times with different contacts and escalating wait times, suggesting unresolved pain points that are compounding across teams and creating churn and expansion risk if not addressed soon.

A small but important cluster of Administrators at property-management and senior-living accounts have been waiting the longest, and their account-wide governance and ROI concerns deserve prioritized outreach given their outsized influence on renewal and upsell decisions.
